inspectionMethod: plastigage at TDC or bearing measurement with micrometer
notes: First main bearing experiences peak loads during high-power operations.

inspectionMethod: plastigage or direct bearing measurement
notes: Central main bearing supports heaviest crankshaft loads.

inspectionMethod: plastigage at TDC or micrometer method
notes: Rear main bearing affects accessory drive alignment.

inspectionMethod: plastigage method at specific crank angle
notes: Rod bearings wear fastest due to highest bearing loads.

inspectionMethod: plastigage measurement
notes: Second rod bearing typically shows balanced wear pattern.

inspectionMethod: plastigage or direct measurement
notes: Third rod bearing clearance affects cylinder 3 performance.

inspectionMethod: plastigage measurement
notes: Fourth rod bearing controls final cylinder in firing order.

inspectionMethod: dial indicator with journal supported in V-blocks
notes: Taper develops from thermal cycling and non-uniform wear.

inspectionMethod: micrometer at two diameters perpendicular to axis
notes: Out-of-round indicates bearing wear pattern asymmetry.

inspectionMethod: micrometer measurements at rod throw centerline
notes: Rod journal taper from rod loads and thermal expansion.

inspectionMethod: micrometer at perpendicular diameters on journal
notes: Rod journal out-of-round from cyclic loading.

inspectionMethod: lobe height measurement with depth micrometer or calipers
notes: Intake lobes wear faster due to higher valve spring pressures.

inspectionMethod: depth micrometer or calipers on lobe peak
notes: Lobe height loss correlates with lifter face spalling.

inspectionMethod: lobe profile measurement with depth micrometer
notes: Third intake lobe typical wear pattern in four-cylinder engines.

inspectionMethod: depth micrometer or profile gauge
notes: Final intake lobe in four-cylinder cycle sequence.

inspectionMethod: depth micrometer on exhaust lobe profile
notes: Exhaust lobes experience thermal stress from hot gases.

inspectionMethod: lobe height measurement technique
notes: Exhaust lobe wear tracks with combustion chamber temperatures.

inspectionMethod: depth micrometer standard method
notes: Third exhaust lobe in standard four-cylinder sequence.

inspectionMethod: lobe height measurement with precision tools
notes: Final exhaust lobe in firing sequence.

inspectionMethod: plastigage on cam journal or dial bore gauge
notes: Cam bearing clearance affects lobe wear progression.

inspectionMethod: plastigage or dial bore measurement
notes: Central cam bearing clearance drives intake/exhaust timing.

inspectionMethod: plastigage measurement
notes: Third cam bearing clearance standard measurement.

inspectionMethod: plastigage or bore gauge
notes: Rear cam bearing clearance measurement technique.

inspectionMethod: visual inspection of lifter face under magnification or depth measurement
notes: Lifter face spalling indicates cam lobe wear acceleration.

inspectionMethod: visual inspection with magnification
notes: Second lifter face spalling progression.

inspectionMethod: magnified visual inspection
notes: Third intake lifter face spalling standard.

inspectionMethod: visual inspection technique
notes: Fourth intake lifter spalling depth measurement.

displayName: Hydraulic Lifter #5 Exhaust Face Spalling Depth
inspectionMethod: magnified visual or depth measurement
notes: First exhaust lifter spalling indicates thermal wear.

displayName: Hydraulic Lifter #6 Exhaust Face Spalling Depth
inspectionMethod: visual inspection
notes: Second exhaust lifter thermal wear progression.

displayName: Hydraulic Lifter #7 Exhaust Face Spalling Depth
inspectionMethod: magnified visual inspection
notes: Third exhaust lifter spalling standard measurement.

displayName: Hydraulic Lifter #8 Exhaust Face Spalling Depth
inspectionMethod: visual inspection technique
notes: Fourth exhaust lifter spalling depth.

inspectionMethod: feeler gauge between meshing gear teeth
notes: Oil pump efficiency decreases with gear backlash.

inspectionMethod: feeler gauge or dial indicator between pump body and cover
notes: End clearance leakage reduces oil pump delivery.

inspectionMethod: feeler gauge between meshing gear teeth at rear
notes: Accessory gear backlash affects magneto/alternator timing.

inspectionMethod: torque wrench verification at each through-bolt per TCM/Lycoming spec
notes: Through-bolts should be retorqued per manufacturer intervals.

inspectionMethod: bushing to journal clearance with feeler gauge or micrometer
notes: Dynamic counterweight bushings support crankshaft balance.

inspectionMethod: bushing clearance measurement
notes: Rear counterweight bushing wear affects engine balance.

inspectionMethod: compression ring installed in cylinder, measure end gap with feeler gauge
notes: Ring gap controls blow-by; excessive gap increases ring flutter.

inspectionMethod: compression ring gap measurement in bore
notes: Second compression ring sealing contributes to blow-by control.

displayName: Oil Control Ring End Gap Cyl 1
inspectionMethod: oil ring gap measured with feeler gauge in cylinder
notes: Oil ring gap controls ring drift and oil scraping efficacy.

inspectionMethod: feeler gauge between piston skirt and cylinder bore
notes: Piston clearance increases with bore wear and thermal expansion.

displayName: Cylinder Bore Taper Cyl 1 (Top vs Bottom)
inspectionMethod: bore gauge at top and bottom of bore, calculate taper
notes: Bore taper from thermal cycling and wear; top wears faster.

inspectionMethod: bore gauge at single depth, measure perpendicular diameters
notes: Out-of-round develops from high combustion pressures.

inspectionMethod: depth measurement from valve seat to valve face, compare to new standard
notes: Valve recession reduces seat contact and compression.

inspectionMethod: recession depth measurement from seat to face
notes: Exhaust valve recession driven by thermal stress.

inspectionMethod: dial gauge on valve stem, measure radial play
notes: Intake guide wear increases oil ingestion.

inspectionMethod: dial gauge on exhaust valve stem
notes: Exhaust guide clearance loosens under thermal cycling.

inspectionMethod: spring tester on assembled spring set at closed position
notes: Spring fatigue measured at valve-closed compression height.

inspectionMethod: feeler gauge between rocker shaft and bushing bore
notes: Rocker bushing wear affects valve lash variability.

inspectionMethod: visual inspection for cracks, hardening, or separation from tube
notes: Pushrod seal deterioration from thermal cycling and age.

inspectionMethod: compression ring installed in cylinder, measure end gap with feeler gauge
notes: Ring gap controls blow-by and ring flutter.

inspectionMethod: compression ring gap measurement in bore
notes: Second compression ring sealing for blow-by control.
